task: Fix the stale CLI skill so agents using Datalox through the wrapper/CLI generate product trajectory rows with the same snippet and quality rules as the MCP path.
summary: The CLI fallback guidance now matches the MCP trajectory product path: product rows use record_trajectory or datalox record-trajectory, include standalone exact before/after snippets, and must repair rows downgraded by the quality gate before export.
observations: user: Asked whether the other thread using the CLI meant the MCP path had been updated but the CLI skill had not, then asked to fix it.
agent: Read the maintain-datalox-pack skill, the CLI skill, and the linked CLI note, confirming the active CLI guidance still said to use record_turn_result/datalox record after grounded outcomes.
tool: Scanned active docs for record_trajectory, record-trajectory, record_turn_result, qualityDowngraded, and snippet guidance to identify stale surfaces.
agent: Patched the CLI skill workflow to prefer MCP record_trajectory, fall back to CLI record-trajectory, require exact before/after snippets, and treat qualityDowngraded as a repair signal.
agent: Patched the linked CLI note so adopted hosts receive the same product trajectory guidance and no longer learn legacy record_turn_result as the post-run capture path.

agent: Added regression assertions to adoption and wrapper tests so copied host skill/note surfaces must contain record-trajectory guidance and must not contain the old exact record_turn_result instruction.
tool: Focused adoption and wrapper surface tests passed, including the new copied-skill regression checks.

task.prompt: Fix the stale CLI skill so agents using Datalox through the wrapper/CLI generate product trajectory rows with the same snippet and quality rules as the MCP path.
task.environment: Datalox pack instruction surfaces, adoption tests, and wrapper-surface tests

context.error: The MCP path had been updated to record standalone debugging_trajectory.v1 rows with exact before/after snippets, but the CLI fallback skill still told agents to use legacy record_turn_result/datalox record after grounded outcomes. A CLI-hosted agent could therefore keep producing old summary-shaped events without code snippets.
notes: The MCP implementation had already been tightened; the stale path was the CLI skill and note copied into adopted repos.
The fix keeps legacy record_turn_result available for internal guidance maintenance but removes it as the product trajectory recommendation.
Regression tests now check the copied host surfaces, not only the source skill file.

trajectory.content: Asked whether the other thread using the CLI meant the MCP path had been updated but the CLI skill had not, then asked to fix it.
Read the maintain-datalox-pack skill, the CLI skill, and the linked CLI note, confirming the active CLI guidance still said to use record_turn_result/datalox record after grounded outcomes.
Scanned active docs for record_trajectory, record-trajectory, record_turn_result, qualityDowngraded, and snippet guidance to identify stale surfaces.
trajectory.command: rg -n "record_turn_result|datalox record|record-trajectory|record_trajectory|qualityDowngraded|context\.relevant_files|before/after" DATALOX.md AGENTS.md docs/trajectory-dataset-schema.md docs/trajectory-training-readiness.md src/core -g '*.{md,ts}'

trajectory.content: Patched the CLI skill workflow to prefer MCP record_trajectory, fall back to CLI record-trajectory, require exact before/after snippets, and treat qualityDowngraded as a repair signal.
Patched the linked CLI note so adopted hosts receive the same product trajectory guidance and no longer learn legacy record_turn_result as the post-run capture path.
Added regression assertions to adoption and wrapper tests so copied host skill/note surfaces must contain record-trajectory guidance and must not contain the old exact record_turn_result instruction.
Focused adoption and wrapper surface tests passed, including the new copied-skill regression checks.

final.fix_summary: The CLI fallback guidance now matches the MCP trajectory product path: product rows use record_trajectory or datalox record-trajectory, include standalone exact before/after snippets, and must repair rows downgraded by the quality gate before export.
final.explanation: This fixes the mismatch where CLI-hosted agents could keep following legacy record_turn_result guidance even though the MCP path and dataset schema had moved to explicit debugging_trajectory.v1 rows. The tests now guard the copied/adopted host surfaces, which is where a fresh CLI agent would read the guidance.

outcome.label: success
outcome.command: npx vitest run tests/adoptionScripts.test.ts tests/wrapperSurfaces.test.ts && git diff --check
outcome.evidence: Vitest reported 2 files and 40 tests passed; git diff --check passed.

curation.notes: Exact markdown guidance changes are carried in final.patch; context.relevant_files keeps executable TypeScript test snippets for code-evidence grading.
